name: John Belushi
title: Last known photo of John Belushi, taken on February 6, 1982, at the wedding reception of Danny DeVito and Rhea Perlman in Beverly Hills — roughly one month before his death.
description: John Belushi was photographed on February 6, 1982, at the wedding reception for Danny DeVito and Rhea Perlman, held at the couple's home in Beverly Hills. The photo was taken by Ron Galella, a celebrated celebrity photographer. Roughly a month later, in the early hours of March 5, 1982, Belushi was found dead in Bungalow 3 at the Chateau Marmont hotel in West Hollywood. The cause of death was acute intoxication from a "speedball" — a combined injection of cocaine and heroin — administered by his companion Cathy Smith, who later pleaded guilty to involuntary manslaughter. He was 33 years old.
bio: John Belushi was an American actor, comedian, and musician. A founding cast member of Saturday Night Live, he achieved further fame starring in Animal House and as one half of The Blues Brothers alongside Dan Aykroyd.
